expectations.text: Explains that syncing upstream/main belongs on main first, not directly on the feature branch by default.
expectations.evidence: The response says to sync upstream on main first and explicitly warns against treating the feature branch as the default sync entry point for upstream/main.

expectations.text: Explains when rebase main on the feature branch is appropriate for cleaner personal history.
expectations.evidence: The response says rebase main is appropriate when the feature branch is personal and the user wants cleaner linear history.

expectations.text: Includes commands for both updating main and updating the feature branch afterward.
expectations.evidence: The response gives one command block for updating main from upstream and then separate command blocks for rebase main or merge main on the feature branch.
